creator: jessefrgsmith@yahoo.ca
text:
When running debootstrap, the application downloads the required items, but does not unpack and set up the Debian environment successfully. debootstrap errors out when it reaches a point where it is trying to mount a Linux /proc file system.

How-To-Repeat: Install debootstrap

Run the commands
mkdir Squeen-dir
su (login as root)
debootstrap squeeze Squeen-dir http://ftp.debian.org/debian

After downloading the required packages, debootstrap produces an error while trying to mount proc and exits.
